title: GRIEF SUPPORT GROUP - 211info
text: SALEM ALLIANCE CHURCH GRIEF SUPPORT GROUP Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a grief and loss support group to assist the healing process. 555 Gaines Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Those who are grieving Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 581-2129 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 581-2129 Peter Vincent [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Marion, Polk, and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: EMPLOYMENT - EMPLOYMENT NETWORK MATERIAL GOODS - FURNITURE BANK MONEY MANAGEMENT - FINANCIAL PEACE UNIVERSITY UTILITIES - THE ROYAL ORDER OF RED SUSPENDERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
